**Furan frontier-orbital energies and gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`. SCF converged in 9 cycles. HOMO = -6.35976 eV, LUMO = -0.10240 eV. No warnings reported.

The HOMO-LUMO gap is 6.25736 eV.
